assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends upgrading L4 pool first (Phase 2) then A100 pool (Phase 3) with different batch sizes and timeouts for autoscaled blue-green strategy

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes CUDA/driver compatibility checks in pre-upgrade checklist and mentions GPU inference models testing on 1.32 staging cluster

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends checking for active fine-tuning jobs and waiting for completion, plus provides maintenance exclusion options for job protection

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration, so surge upgrades cause pod restarts and latency spikes' as justification for blue-green approach

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PDB configuration in pre-upgrade checklist with specific recommendations: 'minAvailable: 80% for L4, 70% for A100'

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically address the issue of auto-scaler creating old-version nodes during upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'GPU inference models tested on 1.32 staging cluster' and 'Fine-tuning framework compatibility verified' in the pre-upgrade checklist
